basic_details.job_title: RCB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate II and Senior Project Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: RCB is recruiting highly motivated candidates with research experience in gut inflammation, microbiology, and molecular biology for the project on Polyphosphate signalling.

qualification.details: Candidates must have strong academic background and hands-on research experience in microbiology, gut inflammation, host-pathogen interactions, and relevant laboratory techniques. Preference will be given to candidates with prior exposure to murine models, cell culture, and advanced molecular methods. | Project Associate-II: Master’s Degree in Natural/Agricultural Sciences/MVSc or Bachelor’s in Engg./Tech/Medicine + 2 years research experience. Experience in gut inflammation, handling microbes/pathogens, murine colitis model, cell culture, molecular biology techniques, confocal microscopy, mass-spectrometry | Senior Project Associate: Master’s Degree ... + 4 years experience OR Doctoral Degree in Science/Engg./Pharma/MD/MS, Experience in protein purification, computational analysis, biochemical assays, molecular biology, gene cloning, etc.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email to appear for Online Interview on 29th July 2026. Final selection is based on academic record
how_to_apply: Visit the official RCB website and click on the respective application links.
Fill the online application form and upload all relevant certificates/documents.
Shortlisted candidates will receive email for the online interview.
Documents Required: Educational certificates, experience letters, research publications, NET/GATE score (if applicable), etc.
important_instructions: Positions are purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. No claim for regular appointment at RCB. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. Incomplete applications or applications received after the deadline will not be considered. Candidates must keep their email active for all communications.

content_sections.heading: Regional Centre for Biotechnology Faridabad Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: RCB is recruiting highly motivated candidates with research experience in gut inflammation, microbiology, and molecular biology for the project on Polyphosphate signalling.

rows.regional_centre_for_biotechnology_rcb_fa: Polyphosphate signalling in microbial pathogenesis and host immunity

content_sections.heading: Regional Centre for Biotechnology Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must have strong academic background and hands-on research experience in microbiology, gut inflammation, host-pathogen interactions, and relevant laboratory techniques. Preference will be given to candidates with prior exposure to murine models, cell culture, and advanced molecular methods. Project Associate-II: Master’s Degree in Natural/Agricultural Sciences/MVSc or Bachelor’s in Engg./Tech/Medicine + 2 years research experience. Experience in gut inflammation, handling microbes/pathogens, murine colitis model, cell culture, molecular biology techniques, confocal microscopy, mass-spectrometry Senior Project Associate: Master’s Degree ... + 4 years experience OR Doctoral Degree in Science/Engg./Pharma/MD/MS, Experience in protein purification, computational analysis, biochemical assays, molecular biology, gene cloning, etc.

content_sections.heading: RCB Faridabad Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email to appear for Online Interview on 29th July 2026. Final selection is based on academic record, research experience, and performance in the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for RCB Faridabad Project Positions
content_sections.text: Visit the official RCB website and click on the respective application links. Fill the online application form and upload all relevant certificates/documents. Submit before 27th July 2026, 5:00 PM. Shortlisted candidates will receive email for the online interview. Documents Required: Educational certificates, experience letters, research publications, NET/GATE score (if applicable), etc.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for RCB Candidates
content_sections.text: Positions are purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. No claim for regular appointment at RCB. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. Incomplete applications or applications received after the deadline will not be considered. Candidates must keep their email active for all communications.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RCB Faridabad Advt. 22/Project/2026/HR?
Q2. How many positions are available in RCB Faridabad Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Two positions — one Project Associate-II and one Senior Project Associate.

faq.question: Q3. What is the emolument for Senior Project Associate at RCB?
faq.answer: ₹42,000/- per month + 27% HRA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the project title for RCB Faridabad recruitment?
faq.answer: “Polyphosphate signalling in microbial pathogenesis and host immunity”.

faq.question: Q5. Is NET/GATE qualification mandatory for Project Associate-II?
faq.answer: Not mandatory, but NET/GATE qualified candidates receive higher stipend (₹35,000/- + HRA).

faq.question: Q6. What experience is preferred for these RCB project positions?
faq.answer: Hands-on experience in gut inflammation, murine colitis model, molecular biology, cell culture, and advanced techniques like confocal microscopy and mass-spectrometry.

faq.question: Q7. When will the online interview be conducted for RCB Faridabad posts?
faq.answer: 29th July 2026 from 10:00 AM onwards.

faq.question: Q8. Who is the Principal Investigator for this RCB project?
faq.answer: Dr. C.V. Srikanth, Professor.

faq.question: Q9. Is the RCB project position permanent or temporary?
faq.answer: Purely temporary (initially 1 year, extendable based on performance).

faq.question: Q10. How to apply for RCB Faridabad Project Associate-II and Senior Project Associate?
faq.answer: Apply online through the respective links on the RCB website and upload all required documents before the deadline.
